## Problem

<!-- What can't you currently do? Or what's painful about how it works today? -->

<!-- How would you like Aigon to behave? Be specific about commands, flags, UI, etc. -->

<!-- What other approaches did you think about? Why didn't they fit? -->

## User story

<!-- Optional: "As a [role], I want [capability] so that [outcome]." -->

- **Workflow**: <!-- feature / research / feedback / not workflow specific -->
- **Mode**: <!-- Drive / Fleet / Autopilot / Dashboard / CLI -->
- **Affected agents**: <!-- cc / gg / cx / cu / all / not agent specific -->
